---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement in plain language
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to add?

Describe the feature in simple words.

## Why does it matter?

What problem does this solve?

## Phase / Week

Reference `kai-pm/PHASE_0_5_BACKLOG.md` (for example: Week 2, item 1).

## Definition of done

How will we know this is complete?
